tmscore.description: The approximated TM-score. Range: 0-1. Higher values imply higher similarity. Values above 0.5 are usually interpreted as matching fold.

biozernike_score.description: The BioZernike score, expressing the likelihood of the match being relevant. Range: 0-1. Deprecation notice: Not used and scheduled for removal with the next major version.

geo_score.description: The score calculated from the GEO descriptors. Range: 0-1. Deprecation notice: Not used and scheduled for removal with the next major version.
